name: 2027 Winter Family Load Fixture
description: Fictional United States family records for local load, workflow, and camp-session testing. Emails use the reserved .test TLD and phone numbers use fictional +1-NPA-555-01XX values.

intended_use.primary_session: Winter high school camp capacity test

standards.emails: All addresses use example.test, a reserved test domain.
standards.phones: All numbers use +1-NPA-555-01XX fictional phone numbers.
standards.identifiers: All UUIDs are deterministic v5-style UUIDs derived from fixture labels.
standards.pii: All people, families, emails, and phone numbers are synthetic.

families.composition_note: Two adults share a household and last name.

campers.accessibility_needs: Quiet check-in space preferred during arrival.

families.composition_note: One mother is the account-owning adult.
One father is the account-owning adult.
Separated co-parents both hold owner access.
Two adults and campers may use different last names.
Two mothers both hold account-owner access.
Two fathers both hold account-owner access.
Grandparent or kinship caregiver manages the family record.
Adoptive parents manage the family record.
Licensed guardian manages campers with a support contact.
Parent and grandparent adults both support the household.
Two adults in one household use different last names.
Aunt or uncle is the account-owning guardian.
One local adult and one remote adult share family access.
